item.title: Show HN: Mini Golf Club – a 3D multiplayer mini-golf game in the browser
item.summary: The game supports up to 10 players in online mode, friend invites in private games, offline career game mode, daily challenges, and hundreds of user-created or handcrafted holes. Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48992117 Points: 2 # Comments: 0
